description: Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
help: Elements must only use permitted ARIA attributes
summary: Fix all of the following:\n  aria-label attribute cannot be used on a fluent-button with no valid role attribute.
source: <fluent-button style="color: var(--colorNeutralForegroundOnBrand);" icon-only="" aria-label="Menu" title="Menu" appearance="transparent" tabindex="0">

description: Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
help: Elements must only use permitted ARIA attributes
summary: Fix all of the following:\n  aria-label attribute cannot be used on a fluent-dropdown with no valid role attribute.
source: <fluent-dropdown id="f4dd60db" slot="input" type="dropdown" aria-label="Filter by status" value="" appearance="outline" style="anchor-name: --dropdown-anchor-85;">

description: Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
help: Elements must only use permitted ARIA attributes
summary: Fix all of the following:\n  aria-label attribute cannot be used on a fluent-dialog with no valid role attribute.
source: <fluent-dialog fuib="" id="f24fe910" style="width: 560px; max-height: 480px;" type="alert" aria-label="Command palette">

description: Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
help: Required ARIA attributes must be provided
summary: Fix any of the following:\n  Required ARIA attribute not present: aria-expanded
source: <button aria-haspopup="listbox" role="combobox" type="button" slot="control" aria-controls="listbox-81" id="input-86">\n    All\n  </button>

summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute
  Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
  Element does not have an explicit <label>
  Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
source: <button aria-haspopup="listbox" role="combobox" type="button" slot="control" aria-controls="listbox-81" id="input-86">\n    All\n  </button>

description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
summary: Fix any of the following:\n  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.75 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #4a9eff, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

relatedNodes.source:
<fluent-button size="small" appearance="primary" aria-label="Create tenant" tabindex="0"><!--!-->
        <!--!-->
                Create Tenant
            </fluent-button>

description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
summary: Fix any of the following:\n  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.52 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #d29922, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

relatedNodes.source: <div role="alert" aria-live="assertive" style="padding: 12px 24px; background: var(--hexalith-status-warning); color: white; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;">
